title: School or work absence note

investigations.text: Supports recording that an issued sick-leave certificate or related medical report is being submitted for employer-facing attestation and distinguishes sick leave, companion leave and medical reports without establishing clinical incapacity.
investigations.rationale: Relevant only to documenting the administrative document type and intended attestation context; it cannot certify illness or attendance limitation.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports recording that an issued sick-leave certificate or related medical report is being submitted for employer-facing attestation and distinguishes sick leave, companion leave and medical reports without establishing clinical incapacity.

source.title: Attestation of Medical Leaves and Reports

investigations.text: Supports licensed-facility, competent-authority, issuance-to-attestation interval, duration-band and medical-committee approval context; it does not authorize automatic certification, backdating, duration selection, or diagnosis disclosure.
investigations.rationale: Relevant to clinician-recorded UAE facility, authority and approval context without selecting dates, duration or content.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports licensed-facility, competent-authority, issuance-to-attestation interval, duration-band and medical-committee approval context; it does not authorize automatic certification, backdating, duration selection, or diagnosis disclosure.

curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
